title: Fishing Is OP
description: Turn fishing into an overpowered loot system for exciting and rewarding gameplay.
body:
The Fishing is OP datapack transforms fishing into a powerful and rewarding activity. Casting your fishing rod now has a chance to grant overpowered items, rare resources, or enchanted gear, making every catch exciting and valuable.

This datapack adds a fun twist to survival gameplay by turning peaceful fishing into a fast progression method. It keeps vanilla mechanics intact while significantly boosting rewards, making it perfect for survival worlds, multiplayer servers, and custom challenges.

Features

Fishing can reward OP items and rare loot

Includes enchanted tools, weapons, and valuable resources

Makes fishing a powerful progression method

Fun and rewarding survival experience

Fully compatible with vanilla mechanics

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
